tool.name: parameter_miner
tool.description: Discover hidden and undocumented parameters through analysis.
tool.details: Common Use Cases: - Generate parameter wordlists for fuzzing - Analyze existing parameters and suggest related ones - Get context-aware parameter suggestions - Get common parameters by category - Discover hidden API parameters and admin functionality

parameter.name: action
parameter.description: The mining action to perform: - get_wordlist: Get parameter wordlist for fuzzing - analyze_params: Analyze existing parameters and suggest related ones - suggest_params: Get context-aware parameter suggestions - get_common_params: Get common parameters by category

parameter.name: categories
parameter.description: Categories to include: authentication, user_management, pagination, filtering, file_operations, debug, callback, format, injection_targets, ssrf_targets

parameter.name: existing_params
parameter.description: List of already known parameters. Required for analyze_params.

parameter.name: context
parameter.description: Context for suggestions: api, graphql, oauth, file_upload, search, admin

parameter.name: include_variations
parameter.description: Include case and format variations (default: true)

returns.description: Parameter lists, suggestions, and analysis results

tool.examples:
# Get parameter wordlist
get_wordlist ["authentication", "user_management"]
# Analyze existing parameters
analyze_params ["id", "name", "user_id"]
# Get context-aware suggestions
suggest_params api
# Get common parameters
get_common_params
